target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Tank is fully engulfed in fire and thick black smoke; visible flames and smoke indicate catastrophic, unrepairable damage consistent with K-kill

summary: One military equipment target assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence. The scene depicts a single tank in a desert environment, fully engulfed in fire and emitting thick black smoke, consistent with catastrophic destruction. The functional impact is complete loss of operational capability for this vehicle.
